query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dockerless: environment-free program verifier for coding agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same domain (coding agents) and a critical dependent variable (the quality and structure of code artifacts produced by agents) that is central to the user's interest in program verification and agent output. While the user's question references a specific "Dockerless" verifier, a literature review on extending such work must include canonical studies that empirically evaluate the structural integrity and maintainability of agent-generate
